title: Gliding
description: Improving Minecraft's air transportation by adding vanilla-friendly gliders
body: ## Support Me ![Youtube](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17d4ca87909921fd4a897b652282fc1382b6a33b.png) ![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bee352562b9baf12d465b3ffe6d7535cad7e753c.png) ![Twitter/X](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4e66b2b5b4df295e42bb2ed98b024c6005efe19.png) ## Development/Showcase Video ## Information mod that adds a new form of air transportation: gliders. gliders are a great alternative to elytras for traveling through the air before beating the game. gliders can be crafted using 3 wool, 1 stick, and 4 of the material of choice (wooden planks, cobblestone, iron ingots, gold ingots, or diamonds). netherite gliders can be made using a smithing table. this works both on singleplayer worlds and multiplayer servers. this is a fabric mod for 1.21 and 1.21.1. to use the mod on forge or neoforge, make sure you also have [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) and [Forgified Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgified-fabric-api) installed. ## Public Usage if you'd like to use assets/modified versions of this mod in your own projects and publicly share them, credit me and link this page or my YouTube video. - **as long as you credit me,** you may use this mod or assets from this mod in your own public social media posts, mod packs, resource packs, and bedrock ports - **please do not** create new showcase webpages, download links, or claim credit for making this pack or assets from this pack. - **if you are unsure,** message me on discord (L33tfox) for permission
